scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n frontend,backend "npm run dev -w @legaladvisor/frontend" "npm run dev -w @legaladvisor/backend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @legaladvisor/shared && npm run build -w @legaladvisor/backend && npm run build -w @legaladvisor/frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @legaladvisor/shared && npm run lint -w @legaladvisor/backend && npm run lint -w @legaladvisor/frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @legaladvisor/shared && npm run typecheck -w @legaladvisor/backend && npm run typecheck -w @legaladvisor/frontend
scripts.test: npm run test -w @legaladvisor/shared && npm run test -w @legaladvisor/backend && npm run test -w @legaladvisor/frontend
